summary: Iteration 24: Newsletter feature and landing page updates - ALL 13 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Verified newsletter subscribe/unsubscribe/status endpoints, landing page CTA ('join the hive'), newsletter section with 'stay in the loop' headline, bee emoji bridge, footer wordmark sizing, navbar wordmark sizing, settings page 'The Weekly Wax' toggle, newsletter popup for non-logged-in visitors (30s delay), and wax report share card 1080x1920 vertical format.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe works for landing page (public, no auth)
Backend: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe rejects invalid email (400)
Backend: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe rejects empty email (400)
Backend: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe handles re-subscribe (updates existing)
Backend: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe works for in-app (authenticated)
Backend: GET /api/newsletter/status returns subscription status
Backend: GET /api/newsletter/status requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe works with auth
Backend: POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe requires authentication
Backend: Full newsletter toggle flow (subscribe -> status -> unsubscribe -> status)
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/{id}/share-card returns 1080x1920 PNG
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/{id}/share-card requires authentication
Backend: API health check passes
Frontend: Landing page Hero CTA button says 'join the hive' (lowercase)
Frontend: Landing page has bee emoji (🐝) between logo and headline
Frontend: Landing page newsletter section visible with 'stay in the loop' headline
Frontend: Landing page newsletter form has email input and subscribe button
Frontend: Landing page newsletter subscribe shows success ('you're in! welcome to the hive')
Frontend: Landing page footer wordmark has w-[180px] md:w-[200px] classes
Frontend: Newsletter popup appears for non-logged-in visitors (after 30s)
Frontend: Popup has 'stay in the loop' headline and subscribe form
Frontend: Settings page 'The Weekly Wax' newsletter card visible
Frontend: Settings page newsletter toggle switch works (subscribe/unsubscribe)
Frontend: Navbar wordmark is h-[52px] (52px measured)
Frontend: Navbar height is h-[66px] (68px measured)
seed_data_creation: Test emails created in newsletter_subscribers collection: testuser_landing@example.com, duplicate_test@example.com, playwright_test_123@example.com, health_check@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Newsletter feature fully working. Newsletter popup only appears for non-logged-in users after 30 seconds delay, uses sessionStorage 'nl_popup_dismissed' flag. Subscribe endpoint is PUBLIC (no auth), status/unsubscribe require auth. Settings page newsletter card is at /settings with data-testid='newsletter-settings-card'. Wax Report share card is now 1080x1920 vertical format. All landing page elements verified: CTA lowercase, bee bridge emoji, newsletter section between features and CTA, footer/navbar wordmark sizes.

landing_page_updates.newsletter_section: Between features and CTA sections with 'stay in the loop' headline
